query:
Alert Name: Encoded PowerShell Execution
Host: WS-105
User: jsmith
Process: powershell.exe
Command Line: powershell.exe -enc SGVsbG8gV29ybGQ=
Network Activity: 185.23.41.6:443

Alert Name: Suspicious Macro Execution
Host: LAPTOP-09
User: asmith
Process: WINWORD.EXE
Command Line: WINWORD.EXE /n /dde
File Path / Hash: invoice_q3.docm
Indicators: Spawned cmd.exe child process

Alert Name: Scheduled Task Created for Persistence
Host: SRV-DC01
Process: schtasks.exe
Command Line: schtasks /create /tn UpdateTask /tr C:\ProgramData\update.exe /sc onlogon

Alert Name: Credential Dumping Detected
Host: DC01
Process: lsass.exe
Indicators: LSASS memory read by non-system process rundll32.exe; Mimikatz strings in memory

Alert Name: Pass-the-Hash Lateral Movement
Host: WS-210
User: DOMAIN\svc_backup
Network Activity: 10.10.1.45:445 SMB connection
Indicators: NTLM authentication with known hash from credential dump

Alert Name: Persistence via Registry Run Key
Host: WS-55
Process: reg.exe
Command Line: reg add HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v Updater /t REG_SZ /d C:\Users\Public\update.exe

Alert Name: WMI Remote Execution
Host: SRV-APP02
Process: wmiprvse.exe
Command Line: wmic /node:10.10.1.12 process call create cmd.exe
Indicators: Remote WMI execution from non-admin workstation

Alert Name: Data Staged for Exfiltration
Host: FILE-SRV01
Process: rar.exe
Command Line: rar.exe a -r -hp C:\Windows\Temp\archive.rar C:\Shares\Finance\*
File Path / Hash: C:\Windows\Temp\archive.rar

Alert Name: DNS Tunneling Detected
Host: WS-88
Network Activity: High-frequency DNS queries to randomised subdomains of evil-domain.com
Indicators: DNS query volume 10x baseline; encoded strings in query names

Alert Name: Suspicious Service Installation
Host: WS-31
Process: sc.exe
Command Line: sc create EvilSvc binpath= C:\Windows\System32\malicious.dll type= own start= auto
Indicators: Service binary not signed
